availability.p: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 Deed Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

All citation, reuse or distribution of this work must contain a link back to DOI: https://doi.org/10.60760/unibo/igcyrgvcyr2 and the filename (IGCyr000000 or GVCyr000), as well as the year of consultation.

support.p: Five adjacent fragments of a white marble stele broken off below, with a small cornice, much chipped off, still visible on top of left side ( 0.37 0.95 0.31 ); the stele, in poor state of conservation, was written on three sides. Some small fragments have been lost since 1930.

layoutDesc.layout: Inscribed; front side (a), 18 lines on the full width (section i), then on two columns (section ii, columns i and ii); left (b) and right (c) sides on one column.

handDesc.handNote: Lines 1-18 of side a 0.01-0.011; from line 19 on, 0.009, but for lines 13-20 of side b, which are slightly smaller.

provenance.p: Found in 1928 at Cyrene: Sanctuary of Apollo, under the stylobate of the curved portico delimiting the Trajanic Baths.
Seen by C. Dobias-Lalou in 1977 in Shahat: Cyrene Museum.

encodingDesc.p: Marked-up according to the EpiDoc Guidelines version 8

revisionDesc.change: added ref to the first edition
checked again everything and in case corrected
checked, updated and in case corrected
checked, updated and in case corrected physDesc, history, and textClass
added seg tagging, patronymic and various names

desc.ref: Side a, lines 15-88 of igcyr014800 List of soldiers

div.ab:
Πο
λιάνθευς
Στραταγοί·
Παραιβάτας Εὐκλείδα,
Δαμάσιππος Πολυ,
Τελεσίας Φιλίνω,
Ἀγχίστρατος Σώσιος,
Ἀρτύμων Βρούκω,
Θεύχρηστος Πολυτίμω,
Θράσυς Κλευδίκω,
νιος Εὐφρονίω,
ς Καρνηάδα.
Λοχαγοὶ τεθρίππων·
έων Ψάφωνος
Ἰάσων Πολυτίμω

πος Μενταίω

Side a, section ii, col. i

Side b

lem.note: only one line lost: checked on the stone

div.p: Side c

fils de Polianthes . Stratèges : Paraibatas fils d'Eukleidas, Damasippos fils de Poly, Telesias fils de Philinos, Ankhistratos fils de Sosis, Artymôn fils de Broukos, Theuchrestos fils de Polytimos, (10) Thrasys fils de Kleudikos, nios fils d'Euphronios, s fils de Karnèadas. Commandants de quadrige : éôn fils de Psaphôn, Iasôn fils de Polytimos, Sôpatros fils de L, Pratarkhos fils d'Ophélandros, Antimakhos fils de Kl.

Amômètos fils de Sylos, (20) Esthlan fils de Khirôn, Aristonoos fils de Philôn, Hagèsistratos fils de Tim, Sôsis fils de Mnasarchos, Iasôn fils d'Aitachinnos, Pratarkhos fils d'Arista, Ankhistratos fils de Barkaios, Stephanos fils d'Aristis, Damophilos fils d'Amômètos, Aleximakhos fils de Aitakhinnos, (30) Aristophanès fils d'Eukleidas, Aristagoras fils d'Euphronios, Kallippos fils de Pratomèdès, Melanippos fils d'Aitakhinnos, Polytimos fils d'Aristotélès, Hypsinos fils de Broukos, Glaukithos fils de Pheidôn, Timandros fils d'Antipatros, Stephanos fils d'Ophelandros, Polyaratos fils d'Ammônios, (40) Skaios fils de Pasippos, Euippos fils d'Antikartès, Autobios fils de Kleumnastos, Baios fils de Kylias, Charilas fils de Baieias, Euagoras fils de Damotimos, Euryphôn fils d'Agnamptos, Polybôlos fils de Straton, Aristophanès fils de Theutimos, Xenophantos fils de Thaliarkhos, (50) fils de Skylax, fils de os, .

(59) Eulaidas fils de , Arkesilas fils de , Polyklès fils de , Philokômos fils de , Iasôn fils d'Aglô, Philoklès fils de Sô, fils de , Antaios fils de , Auto fils de , Poly fils de , Poseid fils de , (70) Euphris fils de , Melanippos fils de , Aristis son of , Eubolos son of , Aristis son of , Asty son of , Eupolémos fils de , Stra fils de , Simôn fils de , Tim fils de , (80) An fils de , fils de , Phil fils de , Ariston fils de , Kylias fils de , Philoxènos fils de , Teli fils de , Theud fils de , Tis fils de , .

, (13) fils de ios, fils de is, fils de as, fils de , os fils de is, fils de khos, fils de , (20) fils de khos, fils de , fils de , fils de Polyanthès, fils de , fils d'Epidamos, fils de ônymos, fils de Polydamas, (30) fils de ôn, s fils de Théaros, fils d' Aristoménès, fils d'Arkhiadas, fils de , fils de , fils d'Antiléôn, fils de , (40) fils de , fils de , fils de , fils de , fils de phanès, os fils d'Iasôn, s fils d'Antiphônos, s fils d'Antiphônos, fils de Theukharis, n fils de Pyrikhos, tos fils d'Hyperanthès, .

, (14) fils de Khairédamos, s fils de Polytimos, fils d'Aleximakhos, fils d'Hipponikos, os fils de Baièias, os fils d'Hagèmôn, (20) fils d'Irènaios, os fils de Paraibis, tos fils de Tèloklès, fils de Pittakos, fils d'Aristis, fils de Pithakos, mos fils d'Hagèmôn, as fils de Nikomakhos, fils de Stratôn, atos fils de Nèlôn, (30)pos fils de Mentaios, .

son of Polianthes . Generals: Paraibatas son of Eukleidas, Damasippos son of Poly, Telesias son of Philinos, Anchistratos son of Sosis, Artymon son of Broukos, Theuchrestos son of Polytimos, (10) Thrasys son of Kleudikos, nios son of Euphronios, s son of Karneadas. Leaders of four-horses chariots: eon son of Psaphon, Iason son of Polytimos, Sopatros son of L, Pratarchos son of Ophelandros, Antimachos son of Kl.

Amometos son of Sylos, (20) Esthlan son of Chiron, Aristonoos son of Philon, Hagesistratos son of Tim, Sosis son of Mnasarchos, Iason son of Aitachinnos, Pratarchos son of Arista, Anchistratos son of Barkaios, Stephanos son of Aristis, Damophilos son of Amometos, Aleximachos son of Aitachinnos, (30) Aristophanes son of Eukleidas, Aristagoras son of Euphronios, Kallippos son of Pratomedes, Melanippos son of Aitachinnos, Polytimos son of Aristoteles, Hypsinos son of Broukos, Glaukithos son of Pheidon, Timandros son of Antipatros, Stephanos son of Ophelandros, Polyaratos son of Ammonios, (40) Skaios son of Pasippos, Euippos son of Antikartes, Autobios son of Kleumnastos, Baios son of Kylias, Charilas son of Baieias, Euagoras son of Damotimos, Euryphon son of Agnamptos, Polybolos son of Straton, Aristophanes son of Theutimos, Xenophantos son of Thaliarchos, (50) son of Skylax, son of os, .

(59) Eulaidas son of , Arkesilas son of , Polykles son of , Philokomos son of , Iason son of Aglo, Philokles son of So, son of , Antaios son of , Auto son of , Poly son of , Poseid son of , (70) Euphris son of , Melanippos son of , Aristis son of , Eubolos son of , Aristis son of , Asty son of , Eupolemos son of , Stra son of , Simon son of , Tim son of , (80) An son of , son of , Phil son of , Ariston son of , Kylias son of , Philoxenos son of , Teli son of , Theud son of , Tis son of , .

, (13) son of ios, son of is, son of as, son of , os son of is, son of chos, son of , (20) son of chos, son of , son of , son of Polyanthes, son of , son of Epidamos, son of onymos, son of Polydamas, son of on, (30)s son of Thearos, son of Aristomenes, son of Archiadas, son of , son of , son of Antileon, son of , son of , son of , son of , (40) son of , son of phanes, os son of Iason, s son of Antiphonos, s son of Antiphonos, son of Theucharis, n son of Pyrichos, tos son of Hyperanthes, .

, (14) son of Chairedamos, s son of Polytimos, son of Aleximachos, son of Hipponikos, os son of Baieias, os son of Hagemon, (20) son of Irenaios, os son of Paraibis, tos son of Telokles, son of Pittakos, son of Aristis, son of Pithakos, mos son of Hagemon, as son of Nikomachos, son of Straton, atos son of Nelon, (30)pos son of Mentaios, .

figlio di Polianthes . Strateghi: Paraibatas figlio di Eukleidas, Damasippos figlio di Poly, Telesias figlio di Philinos, Anchistratos figlio di Sosis, Artymon figlio di Broukos, Theuchrestos figlio di Polytimos, (10) Thrasys figlio di Kleudikos, nios figlio di Euphronios, s figlio di Karneadas. Comandanti delle quadrighe: eon figlio di Psaphon, Iason figlio di Polytimos, Sopatros figlio di L, Pratarchos figlio di Ophelandros, Antimachos figlio di Kl.

Amometos figlio di Sylos, (20) Esthlan figlio di Chiron, Aristonoos figlio di Philon, Hagesistratos figlio di Tim, Sosis figlio di Mnasarchos, Iason figlio di Aitachinnos, Pratarchos figlio di Arista, Anchistratos figlio di Barkaios, Stephanos figlio di Aristis, Damophilos figlio di Amometos, Aleximachos figlio di Aitachinnos, (30) Aristophanes figlio di Eukleidas, Aristagoras figlio di Euphronios, Kallippos figlio di Pratomedes, Melanippos figlio di Aitachinnos, Polytimos figlio di Aristoteles, Hypsinos figlio di Broukos, Glaukithos figlio di Pheidon, Timandros figlio di Antipatros, Stephanos figlio di Ophelandros, Polyaratos figlio di Ammonios, (40) Skaios figlio di Pasippos, Euippos figlio di Antikartes, Autobios figlio di Kleumnastos, Baios figlio di Kylias, Charilas figlio di Baieias, Euagoras figlio di Damotimos, Euryphon figlio di Agnamptos, Polybolos figlio di Straton, Aristophanes figlio di Theutimos, Xenophantos figlio di Thaliarchos, (50) figlio di Skylax, figlio di os, .

(59) Eulaidas figlio di , Arkesilas figlio di , Polykles figlio di , Philokomos figlio di , Iason figlio di Aglo, Philokles figlio di So, figlio di , Antaios figlio di , Auto figlio di , Poly figlio di , Poseid figlio di , (70) Euphris figlio di , Melanippos figlio di , Aristis figlio di , Eubolos figlio di , Aristis figlio di , Asty figlio di , Eupolemos figlio di , Stra figlio di , Simon figlio di , Tim figlio di , (80) An figlio di , figlio di , Phil figlio di , Ariston figlio di , Kylias figlio di , Philoxenos figlio di , Teli figlio di , Theud figlio di , Tis figlio di , .

, (13) figlio di ios, figlio di is, figlio di as, figlio di , os figlio di is, figlio di chos, figlio di , (20) figlio di chos, figlio di , figlio di , figlio di Polyanthes, figlio di , figlio di Epidamos, figlio di onymos, figlio di Polydamas, figlio di on, (30)s figlio di Thearos, figlio di Aristomenes, figlio di Archiadas, figlio di , figlio di , figlio di Antileon, figlio di , figlio di , figlio di , figlio di , (40) figlio di , figlio di phanes, os figlio di Iason, s figlio di Antiphonos, s figlio di Antiphonos, figlio di Theucharis, n figlio di Pyrichos, tos figlio di Hyperanthes, .

, (14) figlio di Chairedamos, s figlio di Polytimos, figlio di Aleximachos, figlio di Hipponikos, os figlio di Baieias, os figlio di Hagemon, (20) figlio di Irenaios, os figlio di Paraibis, tos figlio di Telokles, figlio di Pittakos, figlio di Aristis, figlio di Pithakos, mos figlio di Hagemon, as figlio di Nikomachos, figlio di Straton, atos figlio di Nelon, (30)pos figlio di Mentaios, .

Oliverio, probably rightly, suspected that the priest's name stood on top of side a, at lines 1-2. The formulation of such a title may vary in length, so that it is impossible to know whether the mutilated name was that of the priest or of his father. Moreover, as pointed out by , this name, restored by Oliverio as Polianthes, a very common name at Cyrene, might be Thalianthes as well.

This is one of the lists of military officers; however we have here only two mentions of offices at ll. 3 and 13 of side a. Presumably, after the paragraphos began a list of men forming one body (λόχος); other mentions of offices might be given in some of the lost lines.
The names, fully or partially preserved, amount at 108, whereas there may have been at least 39 more.
At side a, l. 11, Reynolds' suggestion of a son named like his father would be a good idea, if the ending was rare. In fact, Ἀμμώνιος is so common in Cyrenaica that we cannot ignore its possibility.

At side a, line 40, Reynolds suggestion of a name Σκαῖος is supported by a small part of the lower oblique stroke of sigma preserved on the rim, against Oliverio's Ἀκαῖος, which was no oddity, being the ethnikon of the Phenician city of Ake. Although rare, Skaios is known as a personal name in literary texts and is based upon the adjective σκαιός 'left, lefthanded, awkward'. Such a name was given for apotropaic reasons.
At side a, l. 65 it might be Αιαλαν, a Libyan name now attested several times. Oliverio's reading is impossible anyway.
